providers.title: Premji Invest backs NewEra Hosp to expand quality care
providers.summary: The investment supports expansion of NewEra Hospitals to deepen access to quaternary care across the region. NewEra Hospitals currently has two hospitals in Nagpur and one in Navi Mumbai. It has established strong clinical credibility in complex specialities...

providers.title: Fortis Healthcare, Healthify launch hospital-led digital weight management programme

diagnostics.title: Quest Diagnostics raises full-year forecast, posts strong quarter on testing demand
diagnostics.summary: U.S. diagnostic testing providers are navigating post-pandemic ‌normalization, leaning ⁠on routine ⁠testing and hospital laboratory management deals to drive volumes amid sustained reimbursement ​pressure and elevated labor costs.
